name: Fujairah (United Arab Emirates)

colors.symbolism: peace and the unity of the federation
the agriculture and palm oases of the eastern coast
the petroleum wealth of the emirate

description: A green-white-black horizontal triband with a red vertical stripe along the hoist.
history: Fujairah, the only UAE emirate located entirely on the Gulf of Oman coast, adopted its current flag in the years after the federation of 1971; earlier the emirate flew a plain red flag with a white inscription.
